---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, improvement to an existing skill, or framework enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Type

- [ ] New skill idea
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Framework / tooling improvement
- [ ] Documentation improvement

## Which skill? (if applicable)

- [ ] swing-clarify
- [ ] swing-research
- [ ] swing-review
- [ ] swing-options
- [ ] swing-trace
- [ ] swing-mortem
- [ ] N/A — new skill or framework change

## Problem

What cognitive failure or user need does this address? Be specific about the gap in current behavior.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change. For skill improvements, include:
- What rules would change or be added
- What the output format would look like
- A BAD vs GOOD example if possible

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better?

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, related issues, or examples from other tools.
